title: Drive USB enumeration step by step
description: Walk reset, address assignment, and descriptor requests in order and confirm each before configuring endpoints.
body: Use when a USB device fails to appear or repeatedly resets. Do not jump to endpoint data transfers before the device is addressed and configured. Actions: capture the bus reset, verify the default-address control transfer, and inspect the device and configuration descriptors the host requests. Validation signals include a completed Set Address, descriptor reads without retries, and a successful Set Configuration. Risk boundary: a malformed descriptor can hang the host port, so deny shipping firmware whose descriptors fail a compliance check.
